title.zh: 美国过去7天 Amazon 爆品 Top 20
title.en: US Amazon Top 20 Breakout Products, Past 7 Days

summary.zh: 过去7天美国 Amazon 爆品主要集中在夏季风扇、平价功效个护、手机功能配件与补充装型商品。
summary.en: Over the past 7 days, US Amazon breakout products concentrated in summer fans, affordable functional beauty, phone accessories, and refill-style goods.

highlight.zh: 季节刚需 + 低决策商品占优
highlight.en: Seasonal necessity plus low-friction products dominate

recommendedActions.zh: 连续3天复核风扇与个护上榜持续性
recommendedActions.en: Recheck fan and beauty ranking persistence for 3 straight days

recommendedActions.zh: 把手机配件拆成支架、快充、线材子池继续筛选
recommendedActions.en: Split phone accessories into mounts, chargers, and cables for deeper filtering

watchReason.zh: 周度 Amazon 爆品榜适合持续跟踪短期动销变化。
watchReason.en: A weekly Amazon breakout ranking is useful for tracking short-term sell-through shifts continuously.
